idea: A deep residual network trained on ImageNet that uses skip connections between layers to enable training of very deep convolutional neural networks for image classification.

idea: Using CRISPR-Cas9 to knock out the PD-1 gene in T-cells ex vivo to enhance their anti-tumor activity before reinfusion into cancer patients as an immunotherapy.

idea: Using machine learning trained on DFT-calculated formation energies to predict the thermodynamic stability of perovskite oxides from their chemical composition and crystal structure.

idea: A diffusion model that generates images by learning to reverse a gradual noising process, trained on large image datasets to produce photorealistic samples from Gaussian noise.

idea: A convolutional neural network trained on histopathology slide images to classify cancer tissue as malignant or benign, achieving pathologist-level accuracy on breast cancer detection.

idea: A graph neural network that predicts global weather patterns by modeling atmospheric variables on a spherical mesh, outperforming traditional numerical weather prediction models.

label: already_exists

idea: A BERT-based model fine-tuned on clinical notes from electronic health records for named entity recognition of medical conditions, medications, and dosages, using domain-adaptive pretraining on PubMed.

idea: A CRISPR base editor that converts cytosine to thymine at a target genomic location without inducing double-strand breaks, applied to correct point mutations causing hereditary blindness.

idea: A federated learning aggregation algorithm that weights client updates by the inverse of their local data class imbalance, improving global model fairness across heterogeneous non-i.i.d. client distributions.

idea: A graph neural network for molecular property prediction that incorporates 3D conformer information alongside 2D topology, improving binding affinity prediction for protein-ligand docking.

idea: A sim-to-real transfer framework for robotic grasping that uses domain randomization over lighting, texture, and object mass during simulation training to close the reality gap.

label: incremental
idea: A transformer model for climate downscaling that takes coarse global climate model outputs and generates high-resolution regional temperature and precipitation maps using attention over spatial patches.

label: incremental
idea: A federated intrusion detection system where each network node trains a local anomaly detection model and shares only model gradients, with a central server aggregating updates using robust aggregation to resist poisoning attacks.

label: incremental
idea: A diffusion model for protein structure generation conditioned on amino acid sequence and functional annotations, enabling targeted design of enzymes with specified catalytic properties.

label: incremental
idea: A large language model fine-tuned using reinforcement learning from human feedback specifically for scientific peer review, trained to identify methodological flaws and suggest experiments.

label: incremental
idea: A multi-agent reinforcement learning system where competing trading agents learn market-making strategies, with each agent using a separate transformer to model the order book state.

label: incremental
idea: A generative model that designs novel antibiotic molecules by combining a variational autoencoder for molecular structure with a classifier trained on the Broad Institute antibiotic activity dataset.

label: incremental
idea: A multimodal deep learning model that combines whole-slide histopathology images with bulk RNA sequencing profiles using cross-attention to predict patient survival in lung adenocarcinoma.

label: incremental
idea: A vision-language model that grounds natural language descriptions to 3D point cloud regions by projecting LiDAR scans into a shared embedding space with text using contrastive learning.

label: incremental
idea: A model-based reinforcement learning agent for legged locomotion that learns a differentiable terrain model from proprioceptive sensor data and plans gaits using gradient-based trajectory optimization.

label: novel
idea: A neural network training framework where gradients are never computed explicitly — instead, weight updates are derived from the interference patterns of standing acoustic waves propagating through a piezoelectric substrate, encoding the loss landscape as a physical resonance phenomenon.

label: novel
idea: A living therapeutic where engineered gut bacteria continuously monitor circulating metabolomic signatures via a synthetic quorum-sensing circuit and, upon detecting pre-diabetic metabolic drift, autonomously secrete a tunable insulin-sensitizer peptide calibrated to the deviation magnitude — acting as a closed-loop endocrine prosthetic.

label: novel
idea: A materials discovery framework where a physical simulation of ant colony foraging is directly instantiated on a reconfigurable microfluidic chip — each droplet encodes a candidate crystal composition, and concentration gradients act as the pheromone field guiding search toward high-conductivity regions, bypassing any digital compute.

label: novel
idea: A quantum machine learning architecture where the training signal is encoded as entanglement entropy gradients between subsystems of a many-body quantum state, replacing classical backpropagation entirely with quantum information flow.

label: novel
idea: A language model that represents uncertainty not as a probability distribution over tokens but as a superposition of incompatible semantic frames, collapsing to a specific meaning only when queried in a particular pragmatic context.

label: novel
idea: A moving target defense system where the network topology is continuously mutated according to a schedule derived from a chaos-theoretic map, making it computationally infeasible for attackers to maintain a stable model of the infrastructure.

label: novel
idea: A swarm of microrobots that collectively solve protein folding by physically enacting energy minimization — each robot represents an amino acid residue and uses local magnetic interactions to find the global energy minimum through embodied annealing.

label: novel
idea: A distributed ocean-surface albedo modulation system where a fleet of autonomous microbial mats — engineered cyanobacteria rafts with tunable pigmentation — collectively self-organize their spatial coverage using a stigmergic signaling protocol derived from slime mold aggregation, providing decentralized, reversible solar reflection without centralized control infrastructure.

label: novel
idea: A drug design framework that models the human proteome as a dynamic interaction network and identifies allosteric intervention points where a single small molecule can rewire disease-associated signaling cascades by exploiting conformational epistasis.

label: novel
idea: A macroeconomic theory grounded in thermodynamic irreversibility — treating each market transaction as an entropy-producing event — where equilibrium is replaced by a maximum entropy production principle, and policy interventions are analyzed as perturbations to a dissipative economic attractor, predicting crisis dynamics that rational-agent models structurally cannot.

label: novel
idea: A continual learning system where forgetting is not prevented but actively structured — old knowledge is compressed into fractal attractors in weight space, allowing new tasks to be learned in the gaps between attractors without interference.

label: novel
idea: A brain-computer interface that decodes imagined speech by modeling the coarticulation dynamics of the vocal tract as a hidden Markov model over cortical surface potentials, reconstructing phoneme sequences from silent attempts to speak.

label: novel
idea: A self-healing electronic material where conductive pathways are restored after mechanical damage by a population of chemotactic nanoparticles that navigate to crack surfaces using local electric field gradients as guidance signals.

label: novel
idea: A cross-lingual transfer model that learns language-universal representations by aligning the topological structure of semantic manifolds across languages using persistent homology, without requiring parallel corpora or bilingual dictionaries.

label: novel
idea: A protein design protocol that encodes amino acid sequence space as the codebook of a quantum error-correcting code, such that sequences with high structural stability correspond to valid codewords — exploiting the geometry of the code's logical subspace as an implicit prior that steers generative sampling toward foldable, designable proteins without explicit energy evaluation.

label: novel
idea: A soft robot locomotion controller that uses the mechanical computation inherent in its own elastic body deformation as a reservoir computing substrate, eliminating the need for an explicit neural network controller.
